name: Coldplay
bio: Coldplay has a globally durable catalog built on emotionally direct songwriting, stadium-scale recognition, and constant playlist presence.
notable_for: Arena-ready hooks, emotional choruses, and broad international replay value.
career_highlight: Songs from multiple eras continue to perform across streaming, live culture, and sync use.
revenue_drivers: Global streaming gives the band dependable catalog income.
Emotional songs like ballads and anthem records fit long-tail playlists.
Live relevance and broad brand familiarity increase licensing value.

earnings.assumptions: Modeled from global catalog streaming, live halo, writer participation, and sync-friendly anthem catalog value.

ownership.master_owner: Major-label masters with band-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears band-and-publisher controlled across the core catalog
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No broad catalog sale adjustment is modeled
ownership.notes: Band-side economics are directional because exact master and publishing splits are private.
